prose: Fukui reactivity indices for furan computed using DFT B3LYP/def2-TZVP (tier 'standard') in PySCF, gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1. Partial charges via Mulliken scheme. N±1 states: cation (charge +1, mult 2), anion (charge −1, mult 2). Geometry taken from user-supplied furan.xyz without re-optimization. All SCF calculations converged; integrity.trustworthy = true. The most electrophilic site is C5 (f+ = 1.9242931) and the most nucleophilic site is also C5 (f- = 0.16164). The α-carbons C4 and C5 carry the largest positive dual descriptors (~+1.762), identifying them as the preferred sites for electrophilic attack in the Mulliken finite-difference framework. Charge conservation checks passed (sum(f+) = 1.0000, sum(f-) = 1.0000). No warnings reported by the engine.
